source_references: AIFA Classe A per principio attivo CSV
interpretation_text: Prezzo al pubblico is the AIFA published public retail price. It maps to comparison_category=public_retail_price.
includes_margin: public retail price including VAT and applicable public retail components
caveats: AIFA public lists also include equivalence/reference-price context; this first lane uses the product-level public price only.
This lane should only be compared with other public_retail_price lanes unless an explicit derivation rule bridges margins/VAT.

notes: AIFA public lists also include equivalence/reference-price context; this first lane uses the product-level public price only.
This lane should only be compared with other public_retail_price lanes unless an explicit derivation rule bridges margins/VAT.

source_references: AIFA — Classe A per principio attivo public price list
interpretation_text: Derived ex-factory price from AIFA Prezzo al pubblico using the standard Class A ex-factory share of public price (66.65%). It maps to comparison_category=manufacturer_price and is generated as a virtual price lane with a DerivationRule, not by mutating the observed public retail record.
adjudication_notes: The first implementation uses the standard 66.65% Class A relationship. Distribution-share exceptions are not modelled until a product-specific flag is available in source data.
includes_margin: no standard wholesale/pharmacy margins after derivation
caveats: Derived lane; always inspect the linked DerivationRule before headline use.
Some medicines may follow special distribution-share rules not represented in the AIFA CSV fields currently ingested.

notes: Derived lane; always inspect the linked DerivationRule before headline use.
Some medicines may follow special distribution-share rules not represented in the AIFA CSV fields currently ingested.

caveats: Standard Class A share only; product-specific distribution-share exceptions are not modelled in this pass.
